_comment: Each coder entry can be a plain string (unrestricted) or an object: { "name": "...", "departments": ["Dept A", "Dept B"] }. Restricted coders are only assigned to the listed departments. Optional field 'payment_mode' ("insurance" or "self_pay") filters when the preset appears in the dropdown: presets with 'insurance' only show when an insurance-type payment mode is checked; 'self_pay' only when a non-insurance mode is checked; omitting the field makes the preset always visible.
